managerContact.name: Urban Gadgets Escalation Desk
managerContact.hours: 9 AM - 8 PM IST, Monday to Saturday

policies.shipping: Orders are dispatched within 24 hours. Metro delivery usually takes 2-4 business days and other locations take 4-7 business days.
policies.return: Returns are accepted within 7 days of delivery only for unused accessories in original sealed packaging. Return requests are allowed only after the order status is Delivered.
policies.exchange: Defective items can be exchanged within 7 days of delivery after troubleshooting and verification.
policies.cod: Cash on Delivery is available for orders below INR 4,999 on selected pincodes.
policies.refund: Refunds are processed after product inspection. Prepaid refunds go to the original payment method.
policies.warranty: Most electronics accessories include a 6-month limited warranty against manufacturing defects.

faqs.question: Do products have warranty?
faqs.answer: Most accessories include a 6-month limited warranty against manufacturing defects.

faqs.question: Can I return opened electronics?
faqs.answer: Opened electronics are eligible only if defective and verified by support. Sealed unused products can be returned within 7 days of delivery.

faqs.question: How fast is delivery?
faqs.answer: Metro delivery usually takes 2-4 business days after dispatch. Other locations usually take 4-7 business days.

faqs.question: Is COD available?
faqs.answer: COD is available for orders below INR 4,999 on selected pincodes.

widgetConfig.welcomeMessage: Welcome to Urban Gadgets support. I can help with orders, warranty, returns, or product compatibility.

escalationRules.response: This needs priority attention. I am routing this to a senior support specialist.
